description: Supervisor adversarially fine-tuned on 50/50 mix of clean and SEAR-attacked images, evaluated against attacks crafted against the original undefended model
key_finding: Adversarial fine-tuning against SEAR almost completely neutralizes its effectiveness (F1 recovers from 0.0955 to 0.2460, nearly matching the clean baseline of 0.2495), with no cost to clean-image accuracy. This defense does not generalize to FGSM, BIM, or MIM, which were not part of the adversarial training data — recovery for these is negligible (within noise), consistent with the well-documented attack-specificity limitation of adversarial training in the literature.
